urdu transliteration text:
The Ladies Said Upon Seeing The Trampled Body
Pamal Lasha Daikh Kay Kehti Hain Bibiyaan.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Like Zahra (As), Qasim’s Ribs Have Been Broken
Zahra Ki Tarha Toti Hain Qasim Ki Pasliyaan.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Tukray Pukaray Dasht Mein Labaik Ya Hussain.
Aa Kar Kaha Jo Mula Ne Qasim Ho Tum Kahan.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Body pieces in the desert called out “At your service O’Hussain!” Imam Hussain (as) approached the body, asking Where are you Qasim?

urdu transliteration text:
Pamal Jeete Jee Jo Howa Hai Ossay Salam.
Ro Kar Laho Yeh Kehte Hain Khud Sahib Azzamaan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: He who sends his salutations, while being trampled alive. Even the Imam of the time, cries tears of blood

urdu transliteration text:
Aajao Mere Bhai Talak Bole Yeh Hasan.
Qasim Na Lo Hussain Ki Ghurbat Ka Imtehaan.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Come quick my brother, this Hassan should not be lost. Qasim please don’t test Hussain’s helplessness

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Keh Ke Kuch Nishano Ko Sheh Chomne Lagay.
Abbas(AS) Dekho Ragri Hain Qasim(AS) Ne Ariyaan.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Imam Hussain (as) kissed some markings (in the sand) saying Abbas, see Qasim has rubbed his heels here in agony

urdu transliteration text:
Tukray Uthane Lash Ke Sarwar Ke Sath Sath.
Zahra(SA) Gayin Hain Dasht Mein Jane Kahan Kahan.
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: In search of body pieces, alongside Imam Hussain. Who knows how far Bibi Zahra (as) went in the desert

urdu transliteration text:
Pamal Ho Na Lash Chacha Ki Yeh Soch Kar
Lipta Howa Summo Se Hai Farwa Ka Nojowaan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Hoping to save his uncle’s body from being trampled. Farwa’s young son (Qasim) clung onto the trampling horse’s hooves

urdu transliteration text:
Madar Kare Gi Kis Tarha Deedar Aakhri
Haye Summo Ke Chand Se Chehre Pe Hain Nishaan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How will the mother bid farewell to her son for the last time. The radiant face has been disfigured by hooves’ imprints
